tagline: A little salon in Lake Forest. Care first.

hero.heading: A little salon. A lot of care.
hero.subheading: A neighborhood salon in Lake Forest with the same hands on every chair. Hair, nails, lash work — by appointment, slow on purpose, and the kind of polish that holds for three weeks.

about.label: Le salon
about.heading: One studio. Two stylists. Every appointment, by hand.
paragraphs: Angel is a two-chair salon on the Lake Forest side of El Toro. We're not an empire and we're not trying to be — we're owner-operated, double-booked-never, and the woman who answers the phone is also the one who'll do your nails.
Hair, nails, and lash work are all in the same room because for most of our clients those are the same morning. We block out two hours when you book the trio so nothing feels rushed.
We charge for the work, not the seat. If a service runs short we say so; if it needs the time it takes the time. The point of being small is being honest.

principles.title: By appointment
principles.text: We don't double-book. Your stylist is yours from the first wash to the last topcoat.

principles.title: Three-week polish
principles.text: Structured gel applied over real prep — sealed side walls, cleaned cuticles. Wears like new for twenty-one days.

principles.title: Plain prices
principles.text: Written quote before any add-on. The number on our card is the number on your receipt.

services.title: Signature Gel Manicure
services.description: Cuticle reset, hand massage, structured gel in your choice of colour, sealed side walls. Holds for twenty-one days.

services.title: Spa Pedicure
services.description: Warm soak, sugar scrub, callus refinement, hot-towel wrap, hand-painted polish. Forty-five minutes start to finish.

services.title: Cut & Style
services.description: Consultation, cut, blow-out, finished style. We talk about how you wear it at home before the scissors come out.

services.title: Single-process Colour
services.description: Root-to-tip glaze or full single-process — bond builder included, gloss applied last. Ammonia-free options on request.

services.title: Lash Lift & Tint
services.description: A curl that lasts six to eight weeks, paired with a tint shaped to your eye colour. About forty minutes in the chair.

services.title: Hair · Nails · Lash trio
services.description: Our most-requested package — cut & style, gel manicure, lash lift, blocked back-to-back over two hours. Reserve at least a week ahead.

reviews.name: Lauren M.
reviews.text: I've followed Angel through two studios. The work is meticulous, the room is warm, and you walk out feeling cared for, not processed. The trio is worth every dollar.

reviews.name: Sofía P.
reviews.text: Booked our whole bridal party here — six girls, two stylists, one morning, no chaos. The polish on my mother lasted longer than the honeymoon.

reviews.name: Hannah W.
reviews.text: The only place in south OC where my brunette glaze actually looks like it should. Bonus: the gel manicure I got the same morning is on week three and not chipping.

contact.address: 23532 El Toro Rd, Lake Forest, CA 92630
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Angel Hair Nails Salon, 23532 El Toro Rd, Lake Forest, CA 92630

seo.title: Angel Hair & Nails — A little salon in Lake Forest. Care first.
seo.description: An owner-operated salon in Lake Forest, CA. Hair, nails, lash. By appointment, slow on purpose, gel that holds for three weeks. Lake Forest's quietly-favorite room.
